summary: Strong Python implementation with good error handling and test coverage, but **critical flaw: GitHub Actions uses major-version pins (v4, v5) instead of full commit SHAs** — violates best_practices explicitly stated in spec. Bash pattern `|| RC=$?; RC=${RC:-0}` (workflow L49) is non-idiomatic error handling. Minor: test cases could reduce env-var duplication via helper. Script logic is sound (classification, rendering, exit codes all correct). Test harness validates real CI execution via act—well-designed. Would not ship without action pinning fixes.
